data.title: Granite Construction reports mixed Q2 results; updates FY25 outlook
data.description:
• Granite Construction press release (NYSE:GVA): Q2 Non-GAAP EPS of $1.93 beats by $0.23.
  • Revenue of $1.13B (+2.7% Y/Y) misses by $30M.
  • Adjusted EBITDA (2) increased $22 million to $152 million compared to $130 million for the same period in the prior year.

  • Outlook

    With the acquisitions announced this week, we are updating our 2025 fiscal year guidance as noted below:

    • Revenue in the range of $4.35 billion to $4.55 billion with revenue from the new acquisitions of approximately $150 million (prior $4.2 billion to $4.4 billion) vs. consensus of $4.30B
    • Adjusted EBITDA margin increased to a range of 11.25% to 12.25%
    • SG&A expense unchanged at approximately 9.0% of revenue, inclusive of an estimated $40 million of stock-based compensation expense
    • Effective tax rate for adjusted net income unchanged in the Mid-20s
    • Capital expenditures unchanged with a range of $140 million to $160 million

data.title: Cresco Labs reports Q2 results
data.description:
• Cresco Labs press release (OTCQX:CRLBF): Q2 net loss of $14 million, includes non-cash impairment charges of $9 million related to California assets being considered held for sale.
  • Revenue of $163.6M (-1.3% Y/Y) beats by $1.75M.

data.title: Kontoor Brands beats top-line and bottom-line estimates; updates FY25 outlook
data.description:
• Kontoor Brands press release (NYSE:KTB): Q2 Non-GAAP EPS of $1.21 beats by $0.38.
  • Revenue of $658M (+8.4% Y/Y) beats by $24.3M.
  • Adjusted gross margin of 46.4 percent increased 120 basis points compared to prior year.

  • Updated Full Year 2025 Outlook

    • Outlook includes the anticipated impact from recently enacted increases in tariffs, net of mitigating actions
    • Revenue now expected to be in the range of $3.09 to $3.12 billion (prior $3.06 to $3.09 billion) vs. consensus of $3.05B, representing an increase of approximately 19 to 20 percent (including an approximate 18 percent benefit from Helly Hansen)
    • Adjusted gross margin now expected to be approximately 46.1 percent, representing an increase of 100 basis points compared to prior year. Adjusted gross margin includes an approximate 50 basis point impact from recently enacted increases in tariffs
    • Adjusted operating income now expected to be approximately $443 million, representing an increase of 16 percent compared to prior year. Adjusted operating income includes an approximate $30 million impact from recently enacted increases in tariffs and incremental demand creation and other investments compared to the prior outlook
    • Adjusted EPS now expected to be approximately $5.45 (prior $5.40 to $5.50) vs $5.24 consensus, representing an increase of 11 percent compared to prior year (including an approximate $0.20 benefit from Helly Hansen). Adjusted EPS includes an approximate $0.40 impact from recently enacted increases in tariffs and incremental demand creation and other investments compared to the prior outlook
    • Cash from operations is now expected to exceed $375 million

data.title: Somnigroup International buys equity interest in Fullpower-AI
data.description:
• Somnigroup International (NYSE:SGI) Thursday announced the expansion of its relationship with Fullpower-AI, a provider of biosensing AI solutions.
  • As part of the expanded partnership, Tempur Sealy, a wholly-owned business of Somnigroup, is making a $25 million equity investment in Fullpower to acquire an approximate 15.6% ownership stake.
  • In addition, Tempur Sealy and Fullpower have signed a multi-year extension through 2036 of Tempur Sealy's exclusive rights to embed Sleeptracker technology in its products.

data.title: Playtika GAAP EPS of $0.09 misses by $0.04, revenue of $696M misses by $9.39M
data.description:
• Playtika press release (NASDAQ:PLTK): Q2 GAAP EPS of $0.09 misses by $0.04.
  • Revenue of $696M (+11.0% Y/Y) misses by $9.39M.
  • DTC platforms revenue of $175.9 million decreased (1.8)% sequentially and increased 1.3% year over year.
  • Average Daily Paying Users of 378K decreased (3.1)% sequentially and increased 26.8% year over year.
  • Average Payer Conversion of 4.3%, up from 3.7% in Q2 2024 and consistent with Q1 2025 conversion.
  • Bingo Blitz revenue of $160.2 million decreased (1.3)% sequentially and increased 2.9% year over year.
  • Slotomania revenue of $86.5 million decreased (22.7)% sequentially and decreased (35.4)% year over year.
  • June’s Journey revenue of $69.1 million increased 0.3% sequentially and decreased (7.4)% year over year.
  • We are revising our guidance of revenue between $2.70 and $2.75 billion and maintaining our Adjusted EBITDA between $715 and $740 million.

data.title: SeaWorld Entertainment GAAP EPS of $1.45 misses by $0.35, revenue of $490.2M misses by $6.89M
data.description:
• SeaWorld Entertainment press release (NYSE:PRKS): Q2 GAAP EPS of $1.45 misses by $0.35.
  • Revenue of $490.2M (-1.5% Y/Y) misses by $6.89M.
  • Attendance was 6.2 million guests, an increase of approximately 48 thousand guests or 0.8% from the second quarter of 2024.
  • Adjusted EBITDA[1] was $206.3 million, a decrease of $11.9 million or 5.4% from the second quarter of 2024.
  • Total revenue per capita[2] decreased 2.2% to $78.64 compared to the second quarter of 2024. Admission per capita[2] decreased 3.9% to $41.03 while in-park per capita spending[2] decreased 0.4% to $37.61 compared to the second quarter of 2024.
